indicators.name: Large bed
indicators.rationale: A large bed is essential for comfortable sleep.

indicators.name: Dark curtains
indicators.rationale: Dark curtains help block out light, promoting better sleep.

indicators.name: Quiet environment
indicators.rationale: The quiet environment is conducive to sleep.

reasoning_summary: The space is ideally suited for sleep due to the presence of a large bed, dark curtains, and a quiet environment.
